semantic.role: Domain service specification for user management
responsibilities: Defines the core User entity structure
Implements UserService class for user creation and identity retrieval
Manages in-memory persistence of user data as temporary storage
Encapsulates domain logic for generating unique user identifiers
outOfScope: Persistent database storage or external data sources

English.purpose: This document specifies the domain service for user management within the ArchSpine system, defining the core User entity and the service class responsible for user creation, identity retrieval, and in-memory data persistence.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and architects working on the ArchSpine domain layer who need to understand the boundaries and responsibilities of the user management service, including how user identities are generated and stored temporarily.
key_takeaways: The User entity is the fundamental domain object for user representation
UserService handles creation and retrieval of users with unique identifiers
Data is persisted only in memory, not to a permanent database
The service encapsulates all domain logic related to user identity generation

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档规定了 ArchSpine 系统中用户管理的领域服务，定义了核心用户实体以及负责用户创建、身份检索和内存数据持久化的服务类。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于在 ArchSpine 领域层工作的开发人员和架构师，他们需要了解用户管理服务的边界和职责，包括用户身份如何生成以及临时存储的方式。
key_takeaways: 用户实体是用户表示的基础领域对象
UserService 负责创建和检索具有唯一标识符的用户
数据仅持久化在内存中，不存储到永久数据库
该服务封装了与用户身份生成相关的所有领域逻辑
